source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Strong collaborative English product UI with Japanese typography guidance for team rosters, progress dashboards, assignments, search, approvals, activity logs, and compact status panels.
layout: Compact 8px team-operation grids, steady sidebar and top navigation, dashboard/data density, fur-grain texture strips, pine dividers, restrained shadows, and confident 8px cards and controls.

prompts.label: Transparent wolf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an isolated full-body taiga wolf motif, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single adult grey wolf standing in a calm alert posture, accurate wolf anatomy, thick winter coat with layered grey fur, charcoal guard hairs, pale snow-tipped muzzle and chest, subtle pine-shadow undertones, amber eyes, natural paws and tail, strong cohesive pack-leader presence without aggression. Include fine fur detail but keep the silhouette clean enough for background removal.
Composition/framing: centered complete wolf cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop ears, tail, paws, muzzle, or fur outline. Three-quarter side pose with head turned slightly toward viewer is acceptable; the whole subject must remain fully inside the frame.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves grey fur texture, amber eye detail, pale winter highlights, and taiga forest character.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no forest landscape, no snow ground, no decorative background, no second wolf, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Wolf light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Wolf", derived from the visible isolated wolf cutout with grey winter fur, amber eyes, snow-pale chest, charcoal guard hairs, and taiga pine context. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible strong team system.
Reference use: Use the visible wolf motif as the source of truth. Extract wolf-coat greys, charcoal fur shadows, snow highlights, amber eye accents, pine-dark structure, and taiga forest atmosphere. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and fur texture rhythms.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Wolf, Wolf, Motif Story, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Team Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: snowfield background, wolf-fur grey surfaces, charcoal guard-hair ink, pine-forest primary actions, amber-eye accent and focus, cold mist borders, pale chest highlights, muted taupe undercoat neutrals, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: strong collaborative product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a sturdy humanist sans for headings/body and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, team roster, assignments, search, activity logs, and dashboard numerals. Include short Japanese labels such as チーム, 検索, 進捗, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, team dashboard metric cards, workload chart, sprint burndown line, member table, task queue, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple coordination icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, wolf-fur texture swatches, pine-needle divider swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, calm strong team operations console, snow and mist surfaces, deep pine primary actions, amber eye focus accents, charcoal fur typography contrast, subtle fur-grain texture strips, efficient hierarchy for coordination and accountability, compact dashboard density, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Wolf", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Wolf dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Wolf". It must feel like the same strong team system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible wolf motif and the visible light-mode board.
Reference use: Use the visible wolf motif and light-mode board as references. Preserve wolf-coat greys, charcoal guard-hair ink, amber-eye focus accents, deep pine primary controls, snow/mist text contrast, fur-grain texture, 8px radius language, compact dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Wolf, Dark Mode, Wolf, Motif Story, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Team Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest charcoal wolf-fur background, pine-night panels, mist and snow foreground text, amber-eye accent and focus rings, cold stone borders, slate-grey cards, taupe undercoat neutrals, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: strong collaborative product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a sturdy humanist sans for headings/body and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, team roster, assignments, search, activity logs, and dashboard numerals. Include short Japanese labels such as チーム, 検索, 進捗, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, team dashboard metric cards, workload chart, sprint burndown line, member table, task queue, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple coordination icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, wolf-fur texture swatches, pine-needle divider swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from the wolf's deepest charcoal guard hairs, elevated panels in pine-night green and graphite grey, snow-mist foreground text, amber eye focus accents, deep pine primary actions, cold border lines, subtle fur texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Wolf", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
